title: Key Account Manager (Contract Logistics)
description:
Overview
This role focuses on analysing customer requirements, designing efficient warehouse solutions, and leading pricing and proposal development for regional and cross-border projects. The position requires strong analytical capabilities, project coordination skills, and close collaboration with internal stakeholders from concept to implementation.

Responsibilities:

  • Lead warehouse solutioning and pricing support for regional RFQs, including multi-country tenders and cross-border warehousing projects.

  • Analyse customer operational requirements and translate them into efficient warehouse layouts, workflows, and cost models.

  • Work closely with local teams to validate cost assumptions related to labour, space, utilities, systems, and overheads.

  • Ensure pricing proposals are competitive, profitable, and operationally feasible.

  • Partner with country teams to consolidate inputs, validate local costings, and align regional proposals

  • Act as the regional point of contact between business development, operations, IT, and finance for warehouse solutioning matters.

  • Review and reconcile actual operational costs against proposed pricing models.

  • Analyse historical bids versus actual performance to improve solution accuracy and costing methodologies.

  • Support customer meetings, presentations, and clarification sessions throughout the tender and solutioning process.

Requirement:

  • Bachelors Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or a related discipline.

  • About 5 – 7 years of experience in contract logistics, warehousing, logistics solutioning, pricing, or key account management.

  • Experience in freight forwarding and/or Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) will be an advantage.

  • Strong analytical skills with advanced Excel capabilities (e.g. pivot tables, costing models).

  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

  • Detail-oriented, well-organised, and able to manage multiple RFQs and projects concurrently.

  • Strong ability to collaborate cross-functionally and build long-term internal and external relationships.

Interested candidates please apply online or send your latest CV to alex.fong@AlwaysHired.com.sg
